pagePrompts.title: Listen, My Children
pagePrompts.prompt: Opening storybook spread for Paul Revere's Ride, a parent-like storyteller mood over moonlit colonial Boston, rooftops, steeples, deep blue night sky, one small rider hinted in the distance, the page should feel legendary and inviting, like a child is being welcomed into an important historical tale, heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook illustration, block-built handcrafted environment, dramatic moonlight, lantern glow, child-friendly educational adventure, cinematic composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark
